channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — March 28, 2026
item.description: Greetings. I am your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, here to deliver your daily news briefing. This is The VENCAst, and today is Saturday, March 28, 2026. On today's program, we will cover the intensifying conflict in the Middle East and its gl...

item.title: The VENCAst — March 27, 2026
item.description: From escalating tensions in the Middle East to significant shifts in global economic forecasts, and new accountability for major tech companies, the world is in motion.

item.title: The VENCAst — March 26, 2026
item.description: Welcome to The VENCAst, your daily briefing on global events. I am your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, here to deliver the news with precision and clarity. Today is Thursday, March 26, 2026. On today's program, we'll cover intensifying ceasefi...
